overview:
## Discussion

Use this endpoint to determine whether an app is eligible to promote in a campaign. Use a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] to search for a specific country or region, [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/DeviceClass], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AgeCriteria], or [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].  See the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/EligibilityRecord] object for parameter descriptions and selector condition operators.

# Find App Eligibility Records

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches app eligibility records by adam ID.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to determine whether an app is eligible to promote in a campaign. Use a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] to search for a specific country or region, [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/DeviceClass], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/AgeCriteria], or [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/SupplySource].  See the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/EligibilityRecord] object for parameter descriptions and selector condition operators.

### Payload example: Find app eligibility records
title: Find App Eligibility Records
